name_en: Burberry exquisite crossbody bag, made of grained leather and vintage plaid, featuring a logo-engraved button. Equipped with a detachable strap, decorated with jacquard-woven brand logo. Easily transforms into a shoulder bag or clutch. Style No: 80211101 Size: W25 x H18 x D8.5cm
